## Summary

Describe the change in plain language.

## Related issue

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Maintenance / chore
- [ ] CI / release / infrastructure

## Project-management check

- [ ] The related issue has accurate labels.
- [ ] `Depends on` / `Blocks` relationships are updated and mirrored where relevant.
- [ ] Acceptance criteria are complete or intentionally updated.
- [ ] Follow-up work is captured in a linked issue if needed.

## Testing

List the checks run locally:

- [ ] `cargo fmt --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test`
- [ ] `cargo build`
- [ ] Not run; explain why below.

## Documentation

- [ ] README/docs/examples updated if user-facing behavior changed.
- [ ] Architecture notes updated if design or data flow changed.
- [ ] No documentation changes needed.

## Notes for reviewers

Call out anything reviewers should pay special attention to.
